query:
SELECT 
  id,
  city,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  partnerFee,
  paymentDate,
  notes
FROM orders 
WHERE city IN ('天津', '武汉') 
  AND paymentDate >= '2026-01-16'
ORDER BY paymentDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
